title: ObjectContext
description: The access-control context for the object (resource) side of a PolicyDecision request. Carries the object's type, classification tags, zone, and arbitrary attributes.

objectId.description: URN of the data object being accessed.

objectType.description: The type of the object: dataset, field, asset, run, provenance, schema, or agreement.

tags.description: Classification tags currently applied to this object.

zone.description: The data zone this object resides in (e.g. "raw", "curated", "restricted").

attributes.description: Arbitrary additional attributes for use in policy condition expressions.
